case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. ADOLFO PADILLA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, ADOLFO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, ADOLFO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00 - SERVED MAR-02-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, ADOLFO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-04-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PADILLA, ADOLFO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,595.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
